mapper.select: SELECT po.*, s.name AS supplier_name, u.real_name AS purchaser_name FROM purchase_order po LEFT JOIN supplier s ON po.supplier_id = s.id LEFT JOIN user u ON po.purchaser_id = u.id WHERE po.status = #{status} ORDER BY po.create_time DESC
SELECT po.*, s.name AS supplier_name, u.real_name AS purchaser_name FROM purchase_order po LEFT JOIN supplier s ON po.supplier_id = s.id LEFT JOIN user u ON po.purchaser_id = u.id WHERE po.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO purchase_order (order_no, supplier_id, purchase_date, expected_date, total_amount, status, purchaser_id, remark) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{supplierId}, #{purchaseDate}, #{expectedDate}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{purchaserId}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE purchase_order SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO purchase_order_item (order_id, material_id, quantity, unit_price) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{materialId}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice})
mapper.select: SELECT poi.*, m.name AS material_name, m.code AS material_code, m.unit FROM purchase_order_item poi JOIN material m ON poi.material_id = m.id WHERE poi.order_id = #{orderId}
